name: Dan Gittens
bio: British bare-knuckle boxer from Harlow, Essex, known for finishing power - every pro win has come by knockout inside three rounds. Holds an unbeaten BKB record including wins over Harvey Dossett (2nd-round KO) and Joe Clarke (1st-round KO). Scheduled to challenge for the BKB Welterweight title against Javon Wright at BKB 54 in Manchester on May 16, 2026.
